best_bet.reason: Lowest rain chance of the three counties at 13%, meaning you'll have the longest window of sunny beach time before any storms develop late afternoon, plus light offshore winds early on make the water glassy.

counties.name: New Hanover County
counties.beaches: Wrightsville Beach · Carolina Beach · Kure Beach

counties.name: Brunswick County
counties.beaches: Oak Island · Holden Beach · Ocean Isle Beach · Sunset Beach
